title: BIPCircle audit action catalogue
description: Schema for products/bipcircle/config/auditDefinitions.json. Each entry is the stable UPPER_SNAKE_CASE name of a BIPCircle audit action. The loader builds the { name: name } map that registerAuditActions() expects.

actions.description: Unique set of BIPCircle audit action names. Each must be UPPER_SNAKE_CASE, distinct from every other entry, and minimum 3 characters.
